summary: Try the Easter templates on Grok Imagine
ai_summary: Elon Musk promotes new Easter-themed templates available in Grok Imagine, xAI's image generation feature. This demonstrates product feature expansion and marketing efforts for Grok, xAI's AI assistant, showing how the company is iterating on its AI product offerings with seasonal/themed capabilities to drive user engagement and differentiate from competitors.
embed_html:
Try the Easter templates on Grok Imagine https://t.co/a9JIAuhQ9a

— Elon Musk (@elonmusk) April 5, 2026

parent.text: Buying a Tesla in 2026 is like buying an iphone in 2010 You know eventually everyone will get one
parent.name: Matteo Pellegrini
parent.embed_html:
Buying a Tesla in 2026 is like buying an iphone in 2010

You know eventually everyone will get one

— Matteo Pellegrini (@matteopelleg) April 5, 2026

ai_summary: Matteo Pelleg compares Tesla's market trajectory to iPhone's adoption curve, suggesting that owning a Tesla in 2026 will be as commonplace as owning an iPhone today—implying massive market penetration and inevitable mainstream adoption. Elon's affirmation validates this strategic view of Tesla's market dominance and production scaling, reflecting confidence in the company's ability to achieve exponential growth in electric vehicle market share over the next few years.
embed_html:
True

— Elon Musk (@elonmusk) April 5, 2026
